title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarks a mixed-provider coding workflow where Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 are assigned planning and implementation roles in different combinations. A benchmark matrix tests four configurations against three real GitHub issues, with an Opus-based evaluator scoring each of the 12 resulting PRs across seven dimensions including correctness, code quality, and plan-to-implementation fidelity.
